name: ALTA EQUIPMENT GROUP INC.
business: Alta Equipment Group operates an integrated equipment dealership platform in North America, selling, renting, and providing parts and service for material handling, construction, and environmental processing equipment. The company engages in new and used equipment sales, parts sales, repair and maintenance services, equipment rentals, and rental equipment sales. Customers are primarily focused on equipment reliability and uptime.

exposures.sentence: Additionally, we provide design and build services related to automated equipment installation and warehouse management system integration solutions within our Material Handling segment.
We sell new heavy construction, material handling, and environmental processing equipment.
Further, adoption of advanced power solutions, particularly lithium-ion platforms and early-stage automation technologies, also continued to expand across customer fleets.
Additionally, we provide design and build services related to automated equipment installation and warehouse management system integration solutions within our Material Handling segment.

Our customer end markets include food and beverage, diversified manufacturing, automotive, municipal/government, education, pharmaceutical and medical, wholesale and retail distribution, construction, agriculture and forestry, road building, aggregate and mining, utilities and power generation, and recycling and waste management, among others.

The Company faces risks from cybersecurity threats that could potentially have an adverse effect on our business, financial condition, results of operations, cash flows and reputation.

Artificial Intelligence ("AI") presents risks and challenges that can impact our business, including by posing security risks to our confidential information, proprietary information and personal data.
